name: Privilege Easy Credit Card

milestones.label: 10,000 bonus EDGE REWARD Points on spending Rs 2.5 lakh in a card anniversary year

milestoneBenefits: 10,000 EDGE REWARD Points worth Rs 2,000 on spending Rs 2.5 lakh in a card anniversary year
Annual fee reversed on spending Rs 2.5 lakh in the previous card anniversary year

joiningBenefitsValued.label: 12,500 EDGE REWARD Points worth Rs 2,500 (or redeemable for vouchers worth Rs 5,000) as activation benefit after joining fee payment and first transaction within 30 days

joiningBenefits: 12,500 EDGE REWARD Points worth Rs 2,500 (or redeemable for vouchers worth Rs 5,000) as activation benefit after joining fee payment and first transaction within 30 days
additionalBenefits: Fixed deposit backed secured credit card with minimum fixed deposit of Rs 65,000 and maximum Rs 25 lakh
2 complimentary domestic airport lounge accesses per calendar quarter, subject to Rs 50,000 spends in the previous 3 months
Buy one get one movie ticket offer on District app, capped at Rs 250 once per month
Dining Delights offers through Axis Bank dining programme
1% fuel surcharge waiver on fuel transactions from Rs 400 to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 400 per month
Purchase protection cover up to Rs 1 lakh and credit shield cover of Rs 1 lakh
Convert transactions of Rs 2,500 or more into EMI

salaried: Issued against an Axis Bank Fixed Deposit of Rs 65,000 or more (secured credit card)
selfEmployed: Issued against an Axis Bank Fixed Deposit of Rs 65,000 or more (secured credit card)
